name: Legends of the Superheroes
overview: In a two-part all-action, all adventure and part-time comedy special, many of the greatest superheroes of the DC Comics pantheon team up to take down some of their long-running enemies, then stop for a celebrity roast held in honor of Batman.

trailers.title: Legends of the Superheroes: TV Special | Adam West and Burt Ward | Warner Classics
